innateAbility.name: Static Field
innateAbility.description: All of the Zeus' abilities, and his attacks, excluding item abilities, deals damage equal to a percentage of the affected enemy units' current health.

abilities.name: Arc Lightning
abilities.description: Hurls a bolt of lightning that bounce through nearby enemy units that deals damage.

abilities.name: Lightning Bolt
abilities.description: Calls down a bolt of lightning to strike an enemy unit, causing damage and applies a stun.Can be cast on the ground, affecting the closest enemy hero within the search radius.

abilities.name: Heavenly Jump
abilities.description: Leaps forward and shocks the closest visible nearby enemy unit, prioritizing heroes, dealing damage as well as reducing their movement and attack speed.

abilities.name: Nimbus
abilities.description: Creates a storm cloud anywhere on the map that automatically casts Lightning Bolt on nearby enemy units.

abilities.name: Lightning Hands
abilities.description: Attacks now create Arc Lightning that deal a percentage of its damage.Can be toggled off to stop this effect.

abilities.name: Thundergod's Wrath
abilities.description: Strikes all enemy heroes globally with a bolt of lightning and damaging them.
